CustomField.formula: IF( OR( ISPICKVAL( StageName , "未着手"), ISPICKVAL( StageName , "停滞保留中"), ISPICKVAL( StageName , "訪問１回目"), ISPICKVAL( StageName, "初回見積提出"), ISPICKVAL( StageName , "購買決定者検討中"), ISPICKVAL( StageName , "トライアル"), ISPICKVAL( StageName , "採用一歩手前"), ISPICKVAL( StageName , "検討保留") ), Amount__c, NULL )
CustomField.label: 進行中見積金額
